APPEARANCES: William Gwire, Esq. of Gwire Law Offices 296-8880 for pltf & opposing party; Hilton S. Williams, Esq. of Paul, Hastings, Janofsky & Walker LLP 856-7012 for defts & moving parties.
RULING: The Court modified its tentative ruling and adopted as follows: granted. Plaintiff to pay transfer costs. Defendants' request for fees denied. Order signed in open court. (302/HEK) JUDGE HAROLD E. KAHN, REPORTER LAVENA WARD, CSR 7077
